title: Minion With Banner
author: Brainstorming
prompt: The Minion is flying in mid-air, positioned slightly off-center to the right, with a big, joyful girl grin. she is holding a bright yellow banner with 'OpenCode' written in bold, large, white letters. The background is a simple, solid color with a soft gradient from light blue to white, ensuring the Minion stands out. The overall mood is cheerful and energetic.
promptZh: 小黄人悬浮在半空中，位置略微偏向右侧中心，脸上带着大大的、欢快的笑容。她手持一条亮黄色的横幅，上面用粗体、大号白色字体写着“OpenCode”。背景是简单的纯色，带有从浅蓝色到白色的柔和渐变，确保小黄人突出醒目。整体氛围欢快而充满活力。

title: Cartoon-style of toilet paper
author: Brainstorming
prompt: A cartoon-style roll of toilet paper with a surprised and shocked facial expression, featuring large brown eyes, raised eyebrows, and an open mouth, is mounted on a gold toilet paper holder attached to a beige tiled wall, with a strip of toilet paper hanging down from the roll, and the image is framed by a vertical brown border on either side.
promptZh: 一卷卡通风格的厕纸，带有惊讶和震惊的面部表情，拥有大大的棕色眼睛、扬起的眉毛和张开的嘴巴，安装在固定在米色瓷砖墙上的金色厕纸架上，一条厕纸从卷筒上垂下，图像两侧由垂直的棕色边框框住。

title: logo
author: Brainstorming
prompt: An eco-friendly conceptual logo featuring a stylized white house with a bright green gabled roof and a small grey chimney. The house is encircled by a sweeping, dynamic green ribbon that swirls around it, morphing into two vibrant green leaves at the top left, complete with subtle, glossy dew droplets. The house itself has a simple four-pane window showing a light blue reflection. The design is clean, modern, and minimalist, set against a plain transparent background, emphasizing sustainability, green energy, and environmental awareness. The lighting is bright and even with soft gradients on the leaves and roof to add a sense of three-dimensional depth and a polished, professional finish. Vector illustration, minimalist logo, flat design, clean lines, corporate identity, environmental branding, green energy icon, modern graphic design, high resolution, digital art, smooth gradients, crisp edges, eco logo, sustainable concept, 2D vector, Adobe Illustrator style, professional branding, simple shape design, vibrant green palette, transparent background, web icon style
promptZh: 一个环保概念标志，包含一个风格化的白色房屋，配有亮绿色的山墙屋顶和一个小灰色烟囱。房屋被一条流畅、动态的绿色丝带环绕，丝带在左上角演变成两片鲜艳的绿色叶子，并带有微妙的光泽露珠。房屋本身有一个简单的四格窗户，显示出浅蓝色的反射。设计简洁、现代且极简主义，背景为纯透明背景，强调可持续性、绿色能源和环境意识。光线明亮均匀，叶子和屋顶上有柔和的渐变，以增加三维深度感和抛光的专业效果。矢量插图，极简标志，扁平设计，线条清晰，企业标识，环境品牌，绿色能源图标，现代平面设计，高分辨率，数字艺术，平滑渐变，边缘清晰，生态标志，可持续概念，2D矢量，Adobe Illustrator风格，专业品牌，简单形状设计，鲜艳的绿色调色板，透明背景，网络图标风格

title: Icon
author: Brainstorming
prompt: A whimsical and humorous cartoon illustration of a single giant eyeball character engaged in a workout. The central eyeball is perfectly circular with a bright blue iris featuring radiating lines and a glossy black pupil with white highlights. It has thin, stick-like black arms and legs, wearing red and white sneakers on its feet. The character is lifting two heavy, red, multi-plate dumbbells with a determined expression, holding them aloft with gloved white cartoon hands. The background is a clean, solid, isolated white, emphasizing the bold colors and clean outlines of the character. The lighting is bright and flat, characteristic of classic 3D animation, with soft cel-shading on the eyeball to give it a slight three-dimensional curve. Vector illustration, cartoon style, flat design, bold outlines, clean lines, cel-shaded, isolated on white background, 3D animation style, vibrant colors, playful, humorous mascot, graphic design, clip art, high contrast, digital art, smooth gradients, minimalist background, fitness concept, anthropomorphic character, sharp focus, SVG style, commercial art.
promptZh: 一幅充满奇思妙想和幽默感的卡通插画，描绘了一个正在锻炼的巨型眼球角色。中央的眼球呈完美的圆形，拥有明亮的蓝色虹膜，带有放射状线条，以及带有白色高光的亮黑色瞳孔。它有细长的、像棍子一样的黑色手臂和腿，脚上穿着红白相间的运动鞋。这个角色表情坚定，举起两个沉重的、红色的、多片杠铃片组成的哑铃，用戴着白色手套的卡通手将它们高高举起。背景是干净、纯色、孤立的白色，突出了角色大胆的色彩和清晰的轮廓。光线明亮而平坦，具有经典3D动画的特征，眼球上有柔和的赛璐珞阴影，使其呈现出轻微的三维曲线。矢量插画，卡通风格，扁平设计，粗线条，干净的线条，赛璐珞阴影，白色背景隔离，3D动画风格，鲜艳的色彩，俏皮，幽默吉祥物，平面设计，剪贴画，高对比度，数字艺术，平滑渐变，极简主义背景，健身概念，拟人化角色，清晰对焦，SVG风格，商业艺术。

title: Advertisement
author: Brainstorming
prompt: A split-screen Meta ad showcasing digital fatigue versus visual relief. On the left, a tired professional stares into a harsh, blue-lit computer monitor. On the right, a warm, forest-green sanctuary frames a laptop displaying the 'EyeRest Daily' web platform with its cute Mobobo plant mascot. Soft, natural sunbeams filter through leaves, casting a gentle glow. Bold, modern sans-serif typography at the top reads, 'Screen Fatigue? Reset in 60 Seconds' in clean white, with a supportive subheadline below reading, 'Science-backed visual breaks at EyeRestDaily.com' in soft sage green. The mood is instantly calming, transitions from stressful cool tones to restorative earthy greens and warm whites, and visually connects screen-time relief with nature.
promptZh: 一则分屏 Meta 广告，展示数字疲劳与视觉舒缓的对比。左侧，一位疲惫的专业人士凝视着刺眼的蓝光电脑显示器。右侧，一个温暖的森林绿色庇护所框住了一台笔记本电脑，屏幕上显示着带有可爱 Mobobo 植物吉祥物的“EyeRest Daily”网络平台。柔和的自然阳光透过树叶洒下，投下温柔的光辉。顶部采用粗体现代无衬线字体，以干净的白色写着“屏幕疲劳？60秒重置”，下方辅以柔和鼠尾草绿色的副标题：“基于科学的视觉休息，尽在 EyeRestDaily.com”。氛围瞬间令人平静，从紧张的冷色调过渡到恢复活力的泥土绿和暖白色，并在视觉上将屏幕时间缓解与自然联系起来。

title: Advertisement
author: Brainstorming
prompt: A dynamic, multi-panel ad design perfect for Instagram and Meta stories. The top panel shows the cute EyeRest Daily mascot 'Mobobo' demonstrating a simple eye-tracking exercise, while the bottom panel shows a close-up of healthy, relaxed human eyes looking away from a screen toward a distant green window view. The color scheme features the brand's signature soft green, sky blue, and pastel yellow accents. Bold, high-contrast typography in the center reads, 'Prevent Digital Eye Strain' in a rounded, modern font, with a clear call-to-action subheadline below: 'Start your free daily eye-care routine at EyeRestDaily.com'. The lighting is bright, clean, and clinical yet welcoming, conveying authority, simplicity, and immediate visual comfort.
promptZh: 一个动态的多面板广告设计，非常适合Instagram和Meta故事。顶部面板展示了可爱的EyeRest Daily吉祥物“Mobobo”演示简单的眼动训练，而底部面板则是健康放松的人眼特写，眼睛远离屏幕，望向远处绿色的窗外景色。色彩方案采用品牌标志性柔和的绿色、天空蓝和粉彩黄色点缀。中心采用粗体、高对比度的圆润现代字体，写着“预防数字眼疲劳”，下方有清晰的行动号召副标题：“开始您的免费每日眼部护理程序，访问EyeRestDaily.com”。灯光明亮、干净且具有临床感但温馨，传达权威、简洁和即时的视觉舒适感。

title: Chinese-Japanese Vocabulary Cards
author: Brainstorming
prompt:
<image_prompt_template>
  <scene_description>

    Style: Modern 3D cartoon / clean vector illustration (Pixar style).
    Aspect Ratio: 16:9 (ultra-wide).
    Layout: CRITICAL - The layout must be SPARSE and UNCLUTTERED. Objects must be spread out significantly (ceiling, floor, foreground seats, background aisle) to allow clear space for labels.
    Top Banner Title: "新幹線 (Shinkansen) / 新干线".
  </scene_description>

  <forced_binding_list>
    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **座席**
        Line 2 (Small): /[ざせき]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 座位
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Blue, comfortable cushioned passenger seat in the foreground.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point precisely to the center of the seat cushion.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **テーブル**
        Line 2 (Small): /[te-buru]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 小桌板
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Fold-down table attached to the back of the seat, currently open.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the flat surface of the tray table.</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **窓**
        Line 2 (Small): /[まど]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 窗户
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>Large rectangular train window showing a blurred landscape outside.</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the glass of the window.</anchor_point_directive>

    <binding_item>

        Line 3 (Medium): 过道

    <binding_item>

    <binding_item>

        Line 3 (Medium): 茶

      <anchor_point_directive>Leader line must point to the tea bottle.</anchor_point_directive>

    <binding_item>

        Line 2 (Small): /[でんこうけいじばん]/

promptZh:
<image_prompt_template>
  <scene_description>
    新干线（子弹头列车）内部的详细、生动、教育性插图。
    风格：现代3D卡通/简洁矢量插图（皮克斯风格）。
    宽高比：16:9（超宽屏）。
    布局：关键——布局必须稀疏且整洁。物体必须显著分散（天花板、地板、前景座椅、背景过道），以留出清晰空间供标签使用。
    顶部横幅标题：“新幹線 (Shinkansen) / 新干线”。
  </scene_description>

  <forced_binding_list>
    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **座席**
        Line 2 (Small): /[ざせき]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 座位
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>前景中蓝色的舒适软垫乘客座椅。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须精确指向座垫中心。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **テーブル**
        Line 2 (Small): /[te-buru]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 小桌板
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>安装在座椅背面的折叠桌，当前处于打开状态。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向托盘桌的平面表面。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **窓**
        Line 2 (Small): /[まど]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 窗户
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>大型矩形列车车窗，显示窗外模糊的风景。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向窗户玻璃。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **通路**
        Line 2 (Small): /[つうろ]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 过道
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>排与排座椅之间整洁的地板走道。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向过道的地板。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **網棚**
        Line 2 (Small): /[あみだな]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 行李架
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>座椅上方的头顶搁板，用于存放包袋。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向窗户上方的搁板结构。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **切符**
        Line 2 (Small): /[きっぷ]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 车票
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>一张放在托盘桌上的小型矩形列车票。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向车票。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **車掌**
        Line 2 (Small): /[しゃしょう]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 列车员
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>一名身穿制服的列车工作人员站在背景过道中。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向列车员。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **駅弁**
        Line 2 (Small): /[えきべん]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 车站便当
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>一个色彩鲜艳的便当盒午餐，放在托盘桌上。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向便当盒。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **コンセント**
        Line 2 (Small): /[konsento]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 插座
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>位于墙壁或座椅底部附近的电源插座。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向插孔。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **フック**
        Line 2 (Small): /[fukku]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 挂钩
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>窗户或座椅背面旁边墙上的小挂钩。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向小挂钩。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **ブラインド**
        Line 2 (Small): /[buraindo]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 遮光帘
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>拉下一半覆盖在窗户上的遮阳帘。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向拉下的遮阳帘。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **ヘッドカバー**
        Line 2 (Small): /[heddokaba-]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 头靠套
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>座椅顶部部分的白色布套。</visual_object_description>
      <anchor_point_directive>引线必须指向头枕上的白布。</anchor_point_directive>
    </binding_item>

    <binding_item>
      <exact_text_to_render>
        Line 1 (Bold): **荷物**
        Line 2 (Small): /[にもつ]/
        Line 3 (Medium): 行李
      </exact_text_to_render>
      <visual_object_description>一个安全放置在头顶

title: Chinese-English Vocabulary Cards
author: Brainstorming
prompt:
[Scene Description]**

A detailed, vibrant, and educational illustration of a busy and friendly **Hospital** scene. The scene includes a doctor examining a patient, a nurse holding a chart, and various medical equipment arranged neatly.

**Atmosphere:** Bright, warm, and positive. High saturation colors (Warm Tone) to reduce fear of hospitals.

**Style:** Children's book illustration style + Educational poster aesthetic. Vector illustration style, flat design with clean lines (No blurry 3D renders).



**[Labeling Requirements]**

- **Style:** "Sticker Style" labels (White background stickers with dark text).

- **Placement:** Labels must be placed IMMEDIATELY NEXT TO the corresponding objects. Do not block the main subject.

- **Text Format:** Strict 3-line format:

  Line 1: **TargetWord** (Bold)

  Line 2: /Phonetics/

  Line 3: [Chinese Meaning]



**[Vocabulary List to Label]**

- **Doctor** /ˈdɒktər/ [医生]

- **Nurse** /nɜːrs/ [护士]

- **Patient** /ˈpeɪʃnt/ [病人]

- **Stethoscope** /ˈstɛθəskoʊp/ [听诊器]

- **Mask** /mæsk/ [口罩]

- **Syringe** /sɪˈrɪndʒ/ [注射器]

- **Thermometer** /θərˈmɒmɪtər/ [体温计]

- **Hospital Bed** /ˈhɒspɪtl bɛd/ [病床]

- **Wheelchair** /ˈwiːltʃɛər/ [轮椅]

- **IV Drip** /ˌaɪ ˈviː drɪp/ [输液]

- **Pills** /pɪlz/ [药丸]

- **Bandage** /ˈbændɪdʒ/ [绷带]

- **X-ray** /ˈɛks reɪ/ [X光片]

- **First Aid Kit** /fɜːrst eɪd kɪt/ [急救箱]

- **White Coat** /waɪt koʊt/ [白大褂]

- **Crutches** /ˈkrʌtʃɪz/ [拐杖]

- **Plaster Cast** /ˈplæstər kæst/ [石膏]

- **Ambulance** /ˈæmbjələns/ [救护车]



**[Technical Specs]**

8k resolution, high detail, sharp focus, vector art, educational layout.
promptZh:
[场景描述]**

一幅详细、生动和教育性的医院场景的插画。场景包括医生检查患者，护士拿着病历，各种医疗设备排列整齐。

**气氛:** 亮丽温暖积极。高饱和度颜色（暖色调）以减少对医院的恐惧。

**风格:** 儿童书插画风格 + 教育性海报美学。向量艺术风格，平面设计与清晰线条（无模糊3D渲染）。



**[标签要求]**

- **风格:** "贴纸风格"标签（白色背景贴纸，黑色文本）。

- **位置:** 标签必须紧接着相应的对象放置。不要阻挡主要主体。

- **文本格式:** 严格三行格式:

  第一行：**目标词语**（粗体）

  第二行：/发音/

  第三行：[中文含义]



**[单词列表标签]**

- **医生** /ˈdɒktər/ [医生]

- **护士** /nɜːrs/ [护士]

- **病人** /ˈpeɪʃnt/ [病人]

- **听诊器** /ˈstɛθəskoʊp/ [听诊器]

- **口罩** /mæsk/ [口罩]

- **注射器** /sɪˈrɪndʒ/ [注射器]

- **体温计** /θərˈmɒmɪtər/ [体温计]

- **病床** /ˈhɒspɪtl bɛd/ [病床]

- **轮椅** /ˈwiːltʃɛər/ [轮椅]

- **输液** /ˌaɪ ˈviː drɪp/ [输液]

- **药丸** /pɪlz/ [药丸]

- **绷带** /ˈbændɪdʒ/ [绷带]

- **X光片** /ˈɛks reɪ/ [X光片]

- **急救箱** /fɜːrst eɪd kɪt/ [急救箱]

- **白大褂** /waɪt koʊt/ [白大褂]

- **拐杖** /ˈkrʌtʃɪz/ [拐杖]

- **石膏** /ˈplæstər kæst/ [石膏]

- **救护车** /ˈæmbjələns/ [救护车]

title: High-end Real Estate Poster
